scope_note: QA Obstruction-Compiler Bridge family [112]: family_extension of QA_CORE_SPEC.v1 [107]. Certifies that arithmetic obstruction laws from [111] (inert-prime area quantization) directly constrain control-theoretic reachability claims from [106] (plan-control compiler). If a target arithmetic class has v_p-valuation 1, it is forbidden by [111] and no valid plan/control witness cert from [106] may assert its reachability. This is the first bridge family: it makes the two halves of the QA theory interact.
